{{Infobox concept
| name = Soulbound powers
| introduced = Of Dawn and Darkness
}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Urzaia]] became immune to many [[Soulbound powers]] through training.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c9">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]]'s [[Soulbound powers]] are new and strange to her.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c2">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Kings and Killers ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Tyria]] used [[Soulbound powers]] to create golden thorny ropes.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Independents]]' [[Guild Head]] has [[Soulbound powers]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
